title: Genie Space enhancements
body:
* **Embed a Genie Space (Beta)**: You can now embed a Genie Space as an iframe in a website or application. See [Embed a Genie Agent in an external app](/aws/en/genie/embed).
* **Space thumbnails**: Genie Space authors can now attach thumbnails to a space. Thumbnails appear on the Genie Space's initial chat page and in Genie One. See  [Configure settings](/aws/en/genie/set-up#config).
* **Request Review for Agent mode (Public Preview)**: Users can now request a review for Agent mode messages.
* **Table visualizations with conditional formatting**: Genie can now generate table visualizations with conditional formatting colors for better readability.
* **Agent mode (Public Preview) as default**: Agent mode is now the default conversation setting in Genie Spaces when the Public Preview feature is enabled.
* **SQL attachment fix**: Fixed a bug where SQL attachments generated from intermediate thinking steps appeared in the list conversation messages API response.

ref_links.text: Embed a Genie Agent in an external app
